name: Bee Sort by Sam
author: Poki
description: Bee Sort by Sam is a hexa sorting puzzle where you stack colorful hex honeycombs and match them by color to keep everything neat and tidy! Plan your moves carefully, feed the adorable bees with honeycomb, and solve unique challenges at every level. Collect enough hex tiles to reveal beautiful paintings along the way. Ready to relax, sort, and create? How to play Bee Sort by Sam? Click and hold to move the hex honeycomb, release to drop it. Who created Bee Sort by Sam? Bee Sort by Sam is created by Games By Sam. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Bee Sort by Sam for free? You can play Bee Sort by Sam for free on Poki. Can I play Bee Sort by Sam on mobile devices and desktop? Bee Sort by Sam can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
